M2440_NH_UNSAFE_HM M2440 (M0900) Nursing Home Reason- Unsafe At Home This field indicates the reason the patient was admitted to a nursing home was due to being unsafe for care at home. 0 = Not Checked, 1 = Checked CHAR 1 x
